title: Page Sizes for PostScript
text: Page Sizes for PostScript Uniface supports standard US and ISO paper sizes for PostScript printing. Table 1. Uniface-Supported Page Sizes for PostScript Paper Size Dimensions in Millimeters Width Height A3 297.0 420.0 A4 210.0 297.0 A5 148.5 210.0 A6 105.0 149.0 A7 74.0 105.0 A8 52.0 74.0 A9 37.0 52.0 A10 26.0 37.0 C0: 917.0 1297.0 C1: 648.0 917.0 C2: 458.0 648.0 C3: 324.0 458.0 C4: 229.0 324.0 C5: 162.0 229.0 C6: 114.0 162.0 isob0: 1000.0 1414.0 isob1: 707.0 1000.0 isob2: 500.0 707.0 isob3: 353.0 500.0 isob4: 250.0 353.0 isob5: 177.0 250.0 Letter 215.9 279.4 Legal 215.9 355.6 Ledger 432.0 279.0 Lettersmall 216.0 279.0 ArchA: 229.0 305.0 ArchB: 305.0 457.0 ArchC: 457.0 610.0 ArchD: 610.0 914.0 ArchE: 914.0 1219.0 Related Links PostScript Support Uniface supports output to PostScript files. PostScript files can be directed to a third-party utility for printing or conversion to PDF. This is useful for batch PDF generation, but also provides enhanced printing capabilities on non-Windows platforms. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
